summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X-CLEAN iteration 6 features: Worker monthly stats endpoint and DayManagement reopen after close feature. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Workers page has 3 tabs (Dolgozók, Műszakbeosztás, Statisztika), Stats tab shows month navigator, summary cards, and worker table with correct data. DayManagement page shows Napnyitás form even when day is closed, enabling reopen functionality.

minor.issue: Returns first record (often closed) instead of prioritizing open records when multiple day records exist for same day

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stats/worker-monthly - returns array of worker stats
Backend: GET /api/stats/worker-monthly structure: worker_id, name, location, days_worked, hours_worked, cars_completed, revenue
Backend: GET /api/stats/worker-monthly?month=2026-03 - month parameter works
Backend: GET /api/stats/worker-monthly?location=Budapest - location filter works
Backend: GET /api/stats/worker-monthly - correct values for workers (Nagy István: 1 car/7500 Ft, Szabó János: 2 cars/10500 Ft, Tóth Gábor: 1 car/13000 Ft)
Backend: POST /api/day-records/open - allows opening after day was closed (reopen feature)
Backend: POST /api/day-records/open - correctly blocks when day already has OPEN status
Backend: /api/stats/worker-monthly requires authentication
Backend: /api/day-records/open requires authentication
Frontend Workers page: Has 3 tabs - Dolgozók, Műszakbeosztás, Statisztika
Frontend Workers page Statisztika tab: Month navigator (< YYYY. month >)
Frontend Workers page Statisztika tab: Summary cards with data-testid attributes (total-days-worked, total-hours-worked, total-cars-completed)
Frontend Workers page Statisztika tab: 'Dolgozói havi összesítő' table title
Frontend Workers page Statisztika tab: Table columns - Dolgozó, Telephely, Napok, Órák, Autók, Bevétel
Frontend Workers page Statisztika tab: 5 worker stat rows with data-testid 'worker-stat-row-{id}'
Frontend Workers page Statisztika tab: Month navigation (< >) buttons work
Frontend DayManagement: Shows 'Nap lezárva' status when day is closed
Frontend DayManagement: Shows 'Napnyitás' form when day is closed (reopen feature)
Frontend DayManagement: 'Nap megnyitása' button visible and clickable
Frontend DayManagement: 'Nap sikeresen megnyitva!' toast after reopen
Frontend DayManagement: Daily stats shown (Mai autók, Mai bevétel, Készpénz, Kártya)
Frontend DayManagement: Completed jobs list shown
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: /api/day-records/today endpoint uses find_one without sorting, may return closed record when open exists for same day
seed_data_creation: Multiple day records created for Budapest during testing (now has 3 records for 2026-03-04: 2 closed, 1 open)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 tested two new features: 1) Worker monthly stats on Workers page Statisztika tab - shows days_worked, hours_worked, cars_completed, revenue per worker. 2) DayManagement reopen feature - can now open day after it was closed by creating new record. Budapest has multiple day records for today. The /api/day-records/today endpoint has a minor issue where it may return closed record instead of open one when multiple records exist - suggest adding sort by opened_at DESC or filter for status='open' first.
